zh.lifeSummary: 當Baldwin de Redvers 1st Earl of Devon於大約1102年出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾易斯爾 本 懷特時，他的父親Richard de Vernon Seigneur de Reviers37歲，母親Adelise de Peverel29歲。他於1117年與Adelisa Lucia De Baalun在英國米德萊可倫敦結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1155年6月4日在英國哈普爾易斯爾 本 懷特德享年54歲，埋葬在英國哈普爾華爾 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baldwin de Redvers 1st Earl of Devon于大约1102年出生在英国英格兰哈普爾易斯爾 本 懷特时，他的父亲Richard de Vernon Seigneur de Reviers37岁，母亲Adelise de Peverel29岁。他于1117年与Adelisa Lucia De Baalun在英国米德萊可倫敦结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1155年6月4日在英国哈普爾易斯爾 本 懷特德享年54岁，埋葬在英国哈普爾華爾 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Redvers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Reviers in Calvados (France).

nameMeanings.name: Baldwin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from bald ‘bold, brave’ + wine ‘friend’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. In the Middle Ages it was a comparatively common name, which gave rise to a surname. It was borne by the Norman crusader Baldwin of Boulogne, who in 1100 was elected first king of Jerusalem, and by four further crusader kings of Jerusalem. It continued to be used by some families in England into the 17th century, but in modern times it normally represents a transferred use of the surname rather than a direct revival of the Norman given name.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Baldwin de Redvers 1st Earl of Devon was born about 1102, in Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard de Vernon Seigneur de Reviers, was 37 and his mother, Adelise de Peverel, was 29. He married Adelisa Lucia De Baalun in 1117, in London, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 4 June 1155, in Ryde, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in Quarr Abbey, Hampshire, England.

fr.Ryde, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England: Ryde, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baldwin de Redvers 1st Earl of Devon est né environ 1102, à Isle of Wight, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard de Vernon Seigneur de Reviers, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Adelise de Peverel, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Adelisa Lucia De Baalun en 1117, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 4 juin 1155, à Ryde, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Quarr Abbey, Hampshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baldwin de Redvers 1st Earl of Devon um 1102 in Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Vernon Seigneur de Reviers 37 und seine Mutter Adelise de Peverel 29. Er hat 1117 in London, Middlesex, England Adelisa Lucia De Baalun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 4. Juni 1155 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Ryde, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England und wurde in Quarr Abbey, Hampshire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Adelisa Lucia De Baalun nel 1117, nel London, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Baldwin de Redvers 1st Earl of Devonが約1102年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアイスル オフ ウィトで生まれた時，父Richard de Vernon Seigneur de Reviersは37歳，母Adelise de Peverelは29歳であった。1117年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンでAdelisa Lucia De Baalunと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1155年6月4日にイギリスハンプシュアイアイスル オフ ウィトリドで54歳で死去し，イギリスハンプシュアイアクアル アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Ryde, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England: 영국 함프실르 이슬일 프 와이트 리드
ko.lifeSummary: Baldwin de Redvers 1st Earl of Devon(이)가 대략 1102년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 이슬일 프 와이트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Vernon Seigneur de Reviers(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelise de Peverel(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1117년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 Adelisa Lucia De Baalun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1155년 6월 4일 영국 함프실르 이슬일 프 와이트 리드에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 함프실르 퀄르 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baldwin de Redvers 1st Earl of Devon nasceu aproximadamente 1102, em Isle of Wight, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard de Vernon Seigneur de Reviers, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Adelise de Peverel, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Adelisa Lucia De Baalun em 1117, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de junho de 1155, em Ryde, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Quarr Abbey, Hampshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Ryde, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England: раид, исл оф ваит, хампшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baldwin de Redvers 1st Earl of Devon родился около 1102 г. в местности исл оф ваит, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard de Vernon Seigneur de Reviers было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelise de Peverel, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelisa Lucia De Baalun в 1117 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 4 июня 1155 г. в местности раид, исл оф ваит, хампшир, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности куарр эбби, хампшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baldwin de Redvers 1st Earl of Devon nació aproximadamente 1102, en Isle of Wight, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard de Vernon Seigneur de Reviers, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Adelise de Peverel, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Adelisa Lucia De Baalun en 1117, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 4 de junio de 1155, en Ryde, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Quarr Abbey, Hampshire, Inglaterra.
